properties.name: text
properties.value:
Keep your eyes open for healing ponds, 
If you're low on health they can save your life!

properties.name: text
properties.value:
Combat items can give you an edge
in battle, to equip one, click on
an empty combat item slot, and
select the item.

properties.name: text
properties.value:
You can also target
and open chests you
find along the way
